     919                 :            : 
     920 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         elog(DEBUG5, "Relation to remove catalogname %s, schemaname %s, relname %s",
                 [ #  # ]
     921                 :            :                  (relation->catalogname == NULL ? "<empty>" : relation->catalogname),
     922                 :            :                  (relation->schemaname == NULL ? "<empty>" : relation->schemaname),
     923                 :            :                  (relation->relname == NULL ? "<empty>" : relation->relname));
     924                 :            : 
     925                 :            :         // UNDONE: Not sure how to interpret 'behavior'...
     926                 :            : 
     927                 :          0 :         relOid = RangeVarGetRelid(relation, false);
     928                 :            : 
     929                 :          0 :         object.classId = RelationRelationId;
     930                 :          0 :         object.objectId = relOid;
     931                 :          0 :         object.objectSubId = 0;
     932                 :            : 
     933                 :            :         /*
     934                 :            :          * Lock down the object to stablize it before we examine its
     935                 :            :          * charactistics.
     936                 :            :          */
     937         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (Gp_role == GP_ROLE_DISPATCH)
     938                 :            :         {
     939                 :          0 :                 LockRelationOid(RelationRelationId, RowExclusiveLock);
     940                 :          0 :                 LockRelationOid(TypeRelationId, RowExclusiveLock);
     941                 :          0 :                 LockRelationOid(DependRelationId, RowExclusiveLock);
     942                 :          0 :         }
     943                 :            : 
     944                 :            :         /* Lock the relation to be dropped */
     945                 :          0 :         LockRelationOid(relOid, AccessExclusiveLock);
     946                 :            : 
     947                 :            :         /*
     948                 :            :          * When we got the relOid lock, it is possible that the relation has gone away.
     949                 :            :          * this will throw Error if the relation is already deleted.
     950                 :            :          */
     951                 :          0 :         recheckoid = RangeVarGetRelid(relation, false);
     952                 :            : 
     953                 :            :         /* if we got here then we should proceed. */
     954                 :            : 
     955                 :          0 :         relTup = SearchSysCache1(RELOID,
     956                 :            :                                                          ObjectIdGetDatum(relOid));
     957         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (!HeapTupleIsValid(relTup))
     958                 :          0 :                 elog(ERROR, "cache lookup failed for relation %u", relOid);
     959                 :          0 :         relForm = (Form_pg_class) GETSTRUCT(relTup);
     960                 :            : 
     961                 :            :         /* Qualify the name if not visible in search path */
     962         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (RelationIsVisible(relOid))
     963                 :          0 :                 nspname = NULL;
     964                 :            :         else
     965                 :          0 :                 nspname = get_namespace_name(relForm->relnamespace);
     966                 :            : 
     967                 :            :         /* XXX XXX: is this all just for debugging?  could just be simplified to:
     968                 :            :            SELECT relnamespace from pg_class 
     969                 :            :         */
     970                 :            : 
     971                 :          0 :         relname = quote_qualified_identifier(nspname, NameStr(relForm->relname));
     972                 :            : 
     973                 :          0 :         isTemp = isTempNamespace(relForm->relnamespace);
     974                 :            : 
     975         [ #  # ]:          0 :         elog(DEBUG5, "Relation name is %s, namespace %s, isTemp = %s",
     976                 :            :              relname,
     977                 :            :              (nspname == NULL ? "<null>" : nspname),
     978                 :            :              (isTemp ? "true" : "false"));
     979                 :            : 
     980                 :          0 :         ReleaseSysCache(relTup);
     981                 :            : 
     982                 :          0 :         return isTemp;
     983                 :            : }
     984                 :            : 
     985                 :            : #ifdef USE_ASSERT_CHECKING
     986                 :            : static bool
     987                 :            : CheckExclusiveAccess(Relation rel)
     988                 :            : {
     989         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (LockRelationNoWait(rel, AccessExclusiveLock) !=
     990                 :            :                 LOCKACQUIRE_ALREADY_HELD)
     991                 :            :         {
     992                 :          0 :                 UnlockRelation(rel, AccessExclusiveLock);
     993                 :          0 :                 return false;
     994                 :            :         }
     995                 :          0 :         return true;
     996                 :          0 : }
     997                 :            : #endif
     998                 :            : 
     999                 :            : /*
    1000                 :            :  * Allocate new relfiles for the specified relation and schedule old
    1001                 :            :  * relfile for deletion.  Caller must hold AccessExclusiveLock on the
    1002                 :            :  * relation.
    1003                 :            :  */
    1004                 :            : void
    1005                 :            : TruncateRelfiles(Relation rel)
    1006                 :            : {
    1007                 :            :         Oid                     heap_relid;
    1008                 :            :         Oid                     toast_relid;
    1009                 :          0 :         Oid                     aoseg_relid = InvalidOid;
    1010                 :          0 :         Oid                     aoblkdir_relid = InvalidOid;
    1011                 :          0 :         Oid                     aovisimap_relid = InvalidOid;
    1012                 :            : 
    1013 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         Assert(CheckExclusiveAccess(rel));
    1014                 :            : 
    1015                 :            :         /*
    1016                 :            :          * Create a new empty storage file for the relation, and assign it as
    1017                 :            :          * the relfilenode value.       The old storage file is scheduled for
    1018                 :            :          * deletion at commit.
    1019                 :            :          */
    1020                 :          0 :         setNewRelfilenode(rel, RecentXmin);
    1021                 :            : 
    1022                 :          0 :         heap_relid = RelationGetRelid(rel);
    1023                 :          0 :         toast_relid = rel->rd_rel->reltoastrelid;
    1024                 :            : 
    1025 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         if (RelationIsAoRows(rel) ||
    1026                 :          0 :                 RelationIsAoCols(rel))
    1027                 :          0 :                 GetAppendOnlyEntryAuxOids(heap_relid, SnapshotNow,
    1028                 :            :                                                                   &aoseg_relid,
    1029                 :            :                                                                   &aoblkdir_relid, NULL,
    1030                 :            :                                                                   &aovisimap_relid, NULL);
    1031                 :            : 
    1032                 :            :         /*
    1033                 :            :          * The same for the toast table, if any.
    1034                 :            :          */
    1035         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (OidIsValid(toast_relid))
    1036                 :            :         {
    1037                 :          0 :                 rel = relation_open(toast_relid, AccessExclusiveLock);
    1038                 :          0 :                 setNewRelfilenode(rel, RecentXmin);
    1039                 :          0 :                 heap_close(rel, NoLock);
    1040                 :          0 :         }
    1041                 :            : 
    1042                 :            :         /*
    1043                 :            :          * The same for the aoseg table, if any.
    1044                 :            :          */
    1045         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (OidIsValid(aoseg_relid))
    1046                 :            :         {
    1047                 :          0 :                 rel = relation_open(aoseg_relid, AccessExclusiveLock);
    1048                 :          0 :                 setNewRelfilenode(rel, RecentXmin);
    1049                 :          0 :                 heap_close(rel, NoLock);
    1050                 :          0 :         }
    1051                 :            : 
    1052         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (OidIsValid(aoblkdir_relid))
    1053                 :            :         {
    1054                 :          0 :                 rel = relation_open(aoblkdir_relid, AccessExclusiveLock);
    1055                 :          0 :                 setNewRelfilenode(rel, RecentXmin);
    1056                 :          0 :                 heap_close(rel, NoLock);
    1057                 :          0 :         }
    1058                 :            : 
    1059         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (OidIsValid(aovisimap_relid))
    1060                 :            :         {
    1061                 :          0 :                 rel = relation_open(aovisimap_relid, AccessExclusiveLock);
    1062                 :          0 :                 setNewRelfilenode(rel, RecentXmin);
    1063                 :          0 :                 heap_close(rel, NoLock);
    1064                 :          0 :         }
    1065                 :          0 : }
    1066                 :            : 
    1067                 :            : /*
    1068                 :            :  * ExecuteTruncate
    1069                 :            :  *              Executes a TRUNCATE command.
    1070                 :            :  *
    1071                 :            :  * This is a multi-relation truncate.  We first open and grab exclusive
    1072                 :            :  * lock on all relations involved, checking permissions and otherwise
    1073                 :            :  * verifying that the relation is OK for truncation.  In CASCADE mode,
    1074                 :            :  * relations having FK references to the targeted relations are automatically
    1075                 :            :  * added to the group; in RESTRICT mode, we check that all FK references are
    1076                 :            :  * internal to the group that's being truncated.  Finally all the relations
    1077                 :            :  * are truncated and reindexed.
    1078                 :            :  */
    1079                 :            : void
    1080                 :            : ExecuteTruncate(TruncateStmt *stmt)
    1081                 :            : {
    1082                 :          0 :         List       *rels = NIL;
    1083                 :          0 :         List       *relids = NIL;
    1084                 :          0 :         List       *meta_relids = NIL;
    1085                 :            :         ListCell   *cell;
    1086                 :          0 :     int partcheck = 2;
    1087                 :          0 :         List *partList = NIL;
    1088                 :            : 
    1089                 :            :         /*
    1090                 :            :          * Open, exclusive-lock, and check all the explicitly-specified relations
    1091                 :            :          *
    1092                 :            :          * Check if table has partitions and add them too
    1093                 :            :          */
    1094         [ #  # ]:          0 :         while (partcheck)
    1095                 :            :         {
    1096         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 foreach(cell, stmt->relations)
    1097                 :            :                 {
    1098                 :          0 :                         RangeVar   *rv = lfirst(cell);
    1099                 :            :                         Relation        rel;
    1100                 :            :                         PartitionNode *pNode;
    1101                 :            : 
    1102                 :          0 :                         rel = heap_openrv(rv, AccessExclusiveLock);
    1103                 :            :                         
    1104                 :          0 :                         truncate_check_rel(rel);
    1105                 :            : 
    1106         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (partcheck == 2)
    1107                 :            :                         {
    1108                 :          0 :                                 pNode = RelationBuildPartitionDesc(rel, false);
    1109                 :            : 
    1110         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 if (pNode)
    1111                 :            :                                 {
    1112                 :          0 :                                         List *plist = atpxTruncateList(rel, pNode);
    1113                 :            : 
    1114         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                         if (plist)
    1115                 :            :                                         {
    1116         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                                 if (partList)
    1117                 :          0 :                                                         partList = list_concat(partList, plist);
    1118                 :            :                                                 else
    1119                 :          0 :                                                         partList = plist;
    1120                 :          0 :                                         }
    1121                 :          0 :                                 }
    1122                 :          0 :                         }
    1123                 :          0 :                         heap_close(rel, NoLock);
    1124                 :          0 :                 }
    1125                 :            : 
    1126                 :          0 :                 partcheck--;
    1127                 :            : 
    1128         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (partList)
    1129                 :            :                 {
    1130                 :            :                         /* add the partitions to the relation list and try again */
    1131         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (partcheck == 1)
    1132                 :            :                         {
    1133                 :          0 :                                 stmt->relations = list_concat(partList, stmt->relations);
    1134                 :            : 
    1135                 :          0 :                                 cell = list_head(stmt->relations);
    1136         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 while (cell != NULL)
    1137                 :            :                                 {
    1138                 :          0 :                                         RangeVar   *rv = lfirst(cell);
    1139                 :            :                                         Relation        rel;
    1140                 :            : 
    1141                 :          0 :                                         cell = lnext(cell);
    1142                 :          0 :                                         rel = heap_openrv(rv, AccessExclusiveLock);
    1143         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                         if (RelationIsExternal(rel))
    1144                 :            :                                         {
    1145                 :          0 :                                                 elog(ERROR, "Cannot truncate table having external partition:\"%s\".", RelationGetRelationName(rel));
    1146                 :          0 :                                         }
    1147                 :          0 :                                         heap_close(rel, NoLock);
    1148                 :            :                                 }
    1149                 :          0 :                         }
    1150                 :          0 :                 }
    1151                 :            :                 else
    1152                 :            :                         /* no partitions - no need to try again */
    1153                 :          0 :                         partcheck = 0;
    1154                 :            :         } /* end while partcheck */
    1155                 :            : 
    1156                 :            :         /*
    1157                 :            :          * Open, exclusive-lock, and check all the explicitly-specified relations
    1158                 :            :          */
    1159         [ #  # ]:          0 :         foreach(cell, stmt->relations)
    1160                 :            :         {
    1161                 :          0 :                 RangeVar   *rv = lfirst(cell);
    1162                 :            :                 Relation        rel;
    1163                 :            : 
    1164                 :          0 :                 rel = heap_openrv(rv, AccessExclusiveLock);
    1165                 :          0 :                 truncate_check_rel(rel);
    1166                 :          0 :                 rels = lappend(rels, rel);
    1167                 :          0 :                 relids = lappend_oid(relids, RelationGetRelid(rel));
    1168                 :            : 
    1169         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (MetaTrackValidKindNsp(rel->rd_rel))
    1170                 :          0 :                         meta_relids = lappend_oid(meta_relids, RelationGetRelid(rel));
    1171                 :          0 :         }
    1172                 :            : 
    1173                 :            :         /*
    1174                 :            :          * In CASCADE mode, suck in all referencing relations as well.  This
    1175                 :            :          * requires multiple iterations to find indirectly-dependent relations. At
    1176                 :            :          * each phase, we need to exclusive-lock new rels before looking for their
    1177                 :            :          * dependencies, else we might miss something.  Also, we check each rel as
    1178                 :            :          * soon as we open it, to avoid a faux pas such as holding lock for a long
    1179                 :            :          * time on a rel we have no permissions for.
    1180                 :            :          */
    1181         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (stmt->behavior == DROP_CASCADE)
    1182                 :            :         {
    1183                 :          0 :                 for (;;)
    1184                 :            :                 {
    1185                 :            :                         List       *newrelids;
    1186                 :            : 
    1187                 :          0 :                         newrelids = heap_truncate_find_FKs(relids);
    1188         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (newrelids == NIL)
    1189                 :          0 :                                 break;                  /* nothing else to add */
    1190                 :            : 
    1191         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         foreach(cell, newrelids)
    1192                 :            :                         {
    1193                 :          0 :                                 Oid                     relid = lfirst_oid(cell);
    1194                 :            :                                 Relation        rel;
    1195                 :            : 
    1196                 :          0 :                                 rel = heap_open(relid, AccessExclusiveLock);
    1197         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 ereport(NOTICE,
    1198                 :            :                                                 (errmsg("truncate cascades to table \"%s\"",
    1199                 :            :                                                                 RelationGetRelationName(rel))));
    1200                 :          0 :                                 truncate_check_rel(rel);
    1201                 :          0 :                                 rels = lappend(rels, rel);
    1202                 :          0 :                                 relids = lappend_oid(relids, relid);
    1203                 :            : 
    1204         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 if (MetaTrackValidKindNsp(rel->rd_rel))
    1205                 :          0 :                                         meta_relids = lappend_oid(meta_relids, 
    1206                 :          0 :                                                                                           RelationGetRelid(rel));
    1207                 :          0 :                         }
    1208                 :            :                 }
    1209                 :          0 :         }
    1210                 :            : 
    1211                 :            :         /*
    1212                 :            :          * Check foreign key references.  In CASCADE mode, this should be
    1213                 :            :          * unnecessary since we just pulled in all the references; but as a
    1214                 :            :          * cross-check, do it anyway if in an Assert-enabled build.
    1215                 :            :          */
    1216                 :            : #ifdef USE_ASSERT_CHECKING
    1217                 :          0 :         heap_truncate_check_FKs(rels, false);
    1218                 :            : #else
    1219                 :            :         if (stmt->behavior == DROP_RESTRICT)
    1220                 :            :                 heap_truncate_check_FKs(rels, false);
    1221                 :            : #endif
    1222                 :            : 
    1223                 :            :         /*
    1224                 :            :          * OK, truncate each table.
    1225                 :            :          */
    1226         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (Gp_role == GP_ROLE_DISPATCH)
    1227                 :          0 :                 cdb_sync_oid_to_segments();
    1228                 :            : 
    1229         [ #  # ]:          0 :         foreach(cell, rels)
    1230                 :            :         {
    1231                 :          0 :                 Relation        rel = (Relation) lfirst(cell);
    1232                 :          0 :                 TruncateRelfiles(rel);
    1233                 :            :                 /*
    1234                 :            :                  * Reconstruct the indexes to match, and we're done.
    1235                 :            :                  */
    1236                 :          0 :                 reindex_relation(RelationGetRelid(rel), true);
    1237                 :          0 :                 heap_close(rel, NoLock);
    1238                 :          0 :         }
    1239                 :            : 
    1240         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (Gp_role == GP_ROLE_DISPATCH)
    1241                 :            :         {
    1242                 :            :                 ListCell        *lc;
    1243                 :            : 
    1244                 :          0 :                 CdbDispatchUtilityStatement((Node *) stmt,
    1245                 :            :                                                                         DF_CANCEL_ON_ERROR |
    1246                 :            :                                                                         DF_WITH_SNAPSHOT |
    1247                 :            :                                                                         DF_NEED_TWO_PHASE,
    1248                 :          0 :                                                                         GetAssignedOidsForDispatch(),
    1249                 :            :                                                                         NULL);
    1250                 :            : 
    1251                 :            :                 /* MPP-6929: metadata tracking */
    1252         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 foreach(lc, meta_relids)
    1253                 :            :                 {
    1254                 :          0 :                         Oid                     a_relid = lfirst_oid(lc);
    1255                 :            : 
    1256                 :          0 :                         MetaTrackUpdObject(RelationRelationId,
    1257                 :          0 :                                                            a_relid,
    1258                 :          0 :                                                            GetUserId(),
    1259                 :            :                                                            "VACUUM", "TRUNCATE");
    1260                 :            : 
    1261                 :          0 :                         MetaTrackUpdObject(RelationRelationId,
    1262                 :          0 :                                                            a_relid,
    1263                 :          0 :                                                            GetUserId(),
    1264                 :            :                                                            "TRUNCATE", "");
    1265                 :          0 :                 }
    1266                 :            : 
    1267                 :          0 :         }
    1268                 :          0 : }
    1269                 :            : 
    1270                 :            : /*
    1271                 :            :  * Check that a given rel is safe to truncate.  Subroutine for ExecuteTruncate
    1272                 :            :  */
    1273                 :            : static void
    1274                 :            : truncate_check_rel(Relation rel)
    1275                 :            : {
    1276                 :            :         AclResult       aclresult;
    1277                 :            : 
    1278                 :            :         /* Only allow truncate on regular or append-only tables */
    1279         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (rel->rd_rel->relkind != RELKIND_RELATION)
    1280         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(ERROR,
    1281                 :            :                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_WRONG_OBJECT_TYPE),
    1282                 :            :                                  errmsg("\"%s\" is not a table",
    1283                 :            :                                                 RelationGetRelationName(rel))));
    1284                 :            : 
    1285         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (RelationIsExternal(rel))
    1286         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(ERROR,
    1287                 :            :                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_WRONG_OBJECT_TYPE),
    1288                 :            :                                  errmsg("\"%s\" is an external relation and can't be truncated",
    1289                 :            :                                                 RelationGetRelationName(rel))));
    1290                 :            : 
    1291                 :            : 
    1292                 :            :         /* Permissions checks */
    1293                 :          0 :         aclresult = pg_class_aclcheck(RelationGetRelid(rel), GetUserId(),
    1294                 :            :                                                                   ACL_TRUNCATE);
    1295         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (aclresult != ACLCHECK_OK)
    1296                 :          0 :                 aclcheck_error(aclresult, ACL_KIND_CLASS,
    1297                 :          0 :                                            RelationGetRelationName(rel));
    1298                 :            : 
    1299 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         if (!allowSystemTableModsDDL && IsSystemRelation(rel))
    1300         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(ERROR,
    1301                 :            :                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_INSUFFICIENT_PRIVILEGE),
    1302                 :            :                                  errmsg("permission denied: \"%s\" is a system catalog",
    1303                 :            :                                                 RelationGetRelationName(rel))));
    1304                 :            : 
    1305                 :            :         /*
    1306                 :            :          * We can never allow truncation of shared or nailed-in-cache relations,
    1307                 :            :          * because we can't support changing their relfilenode values.
    1308                 :            :          */
    1309 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         if (rel->rd_rel->relisshared || rel->rd_isnailed)
    1310         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(ERROR,
    1311                 :            :                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
    1312                 :            :                                  errmsg("cannot truncate system relation \"%s\"",
    1313                 :            :                                                 RelationGetRelationName(rel))));
    1314                 :            : 
    1315                 :            :         /*
    1316                 :            :          * Don't allow truncate on temp tables of other backends ... their local
    1317                 :            :          * buffer manager is not going to cope.
    1318                 :            :          */
    1319         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (isOtherTempNamespace(RelationGetNamespace(rel)))
    1320         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(ERROR,
    1321                 :            :                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
    1322                 :            :                           errmsg("cannot truncate temporary tables of other sessions")));
    1323                 :            : 
    1324                 :            :         /*
    1325                 :            :          * Also check for active uses of the relation in the current transaction,
    1326                 :            :          * including open scans and pending AFTER trigger events.
    1327                 :            :          */
    1328                 :          0 :         CheckTableNotInUse(rel, "TRUNCATE");
    1329                 :          0 : }
    1330                 :            : 
    1331                 :            : /*----------
    1332                 :            :  * MergeAttributes
    1333                 :            :  *              Returns new schema given initial schema and superclasses.
    1334                 :            :  *
    1335                 :            :  * Input arguments:
    1336                 :            :  * 'schema' is the column/attribute definition for the table. (It's a list
    1337                 :            :  *              of ColumnDef's.) It is destructively changed.
    1338                 :            :  * 'supers' is a list of names (as RangeVar nodes) of parent relations.
    1339                 :            :  * 'istemp' is TRUE if we are creating a temp relation.
    1340                 :            :  * 'GpPolicy *' is NULL if the distribution policy is not to be updated
    1341                 :            :  *
    1342                 :            :  * Output arguments:
    1343                 :            :  * 'supOids' receives a list of the OIDs of the parent relations.
    1344                 :            :  * 'supconstr' receives a list of constraints belonging to the parents,
    1345                 :            :  *              updated as necessary to be valid for the child.
    1346                 :            :  * 'supOidCount' is set to the number of parents that have OID columns.
    1347                 :            :  * 'GpPolicy' is updated with the offsets of the distribution
    1348                 :            :  *      attributes in the new schema
    1349                 :            :  *
    1350                 :            :  * Return value:
    1351                 :            :  * Completed schema list.
    1352                 :            :  *
    1353                 :            :  * Notes:
    1354                 :            :  *        The order in which the attributes are inherited is very important.
    1355                 :            :  *        Intuitively, the inherited attributes should come first. If a table
    1356                 :            :  *        inherits from multiple parents, the order of those attributes are
    1357                 :            :  *        according to the order of the parents specified in CREATE TABLE.
    1358                 :            :  *
    1359                 :            :  *        Here's an example:
    1360                 :            :  *
    1361                 :            :  *              create table person (name text, age int4, location point);
    1362                 :            :  *              create table emp (salary int4, manager text) inherits(person);
    1363                 :            :  *              create table student (gpa float8) inherits (person);
    1364                 :            :  *              create table stud_emp (percent int4) inherits (emp, student);
    1365                 :            :  *
    1366                 :            :  *        The order of the attributes of stud_emp is:
    1367                 :            :  *
    1368                 :            :  *                                                      person {1:name, 2:age, 3:location}
    1369                 :            :  *                                                      /        \
    1370                 :            :  *                         {6:gpa}      student   emp {4:salary, 5:manager}
    1371                 :            :  *                                                      \        /
    1372                 :            :  *                                                 stud_emp {7:percent}
    1373                 :            :  *
    1374                 :            :  *         If the same attribute name appears multiple times, then it appears
    1375                 :            :  *         in the result table in the proper location for its first appearance.
    1376                 :            :  *
    1377                 :            :  *         Constraints (including NOT NULL constraints) for the child table
    1378                 :            :  *         are the union of all relevant constraints, from both the child schema
    1379                 :            :  *         and parent tables.
    1380                 :            :  *
    1381                 :            :  *         The default value for a child column is defined as:
    1382                 :            :  *              (1) If the child schema specifies a default, that value is used.
    1383                 :            :  *              (2) If neither the child nor any parent specifies a default, then
    1384                 :            :  *                      the column will not have a default.
    1385                 :            :  *              (3) If conflicting defaults are inherited from different parents
    1386                 :            :  *                      (and not overridden by the child), an error is raised.
    1387                 :            :  *              (4) Otherwise the inherited default is used.
    1388                 :            :  *              Rule (3) is new in Postgres 7.1; in earlier releases you got a
    1389                 :            :  *              rather arbitrary choice of which parent default to use.
    1390                 :            :  *----------
    1391                 :            :  */
    1392                 :            : List *
    1393                 :            : MergeAttributes(List *schema, List *supers, bool istemp, bool isPartitioned,
    1394                 :            :                                 List **supOids, List **supconstr, int *supOidCount, GpPolicy *policy)
    1395                 :            : {
    1396                 :            :         ListCell   *entry;
    1397                 :          0 :         List       *inhSchema = NIL;
    1398                 :          0 :         List       *parentOids = NIL;
    1399                 :          0 :         List       *constraints = NIL;
    1400                 :          0 :         int                     parentsWithOids = 0;
    1401                 :          0 :         bool            have_bogus_defaults = false;
    1402                 :          0 :         char       *bogus_marker = "Bogus!";          /* marks conflicting defaults */
    1403                 :            :         int                     child_attno;
    1404                 :            : 
    1405                 :            :         /*
    1406                 :            :          * Check for and reject tables with too many columns. We perform this
    1407                 :            :          * check relatively early for two reasons: (a) we don't run the risk of
    1408                 :            :          * overflowing an AttrNumber in subsequent code (b) an O(n^2) algorithm is
    1409                 :            :          * okay if we're processing <= 1600 columns, but could take minutes to
    1410                 :            :          * execute if the user attempts to create a table with hundreds of
    1411                 :            :          * thousands of columns.
    1412                 :            :          *
    1413                 :            :          * Note that we also need to check that any we do not exceed this figure
    1414                 :            :          * after including columns from inherited relations.
    1415                 :            :          */
    1416         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (list_length(schema) > MaxHeapAttributeNumber)
    1417         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 ereport(ERROR,
    1418                 :            :                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_TOO_MANY_COLUMNS),
    1419                 :            :                                  errmsg("tables can have at most %d columns",
    1420                 :            :                                                 MaxHeapAttributeNumber)));
    1421                 :            : 
    1422                 :            :         /*
    1423                 :            :          * Check for duplicate names in the explicit list of attributes.
    1424                 :            :          *
    1425                 :            :          * Although we might consider merging such entries in the same way that we
    1426                 :            :          * handle name conflicts for inherited attributes, it seems to make more
    1427                 :            :          * sense to assume such conflicts are errors.
    1428                 :            :          */
    1429         [ #  # ]:          0 :         foreach(entry, schema)
    1430                 :            :         {
    1431                 :          0 :                 ColumnDef  *coldef = lfirst(entry);
    1432                 :            :                 ListCell   *rest;
    1433                 :            : 
    1434         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 for_each_cell(rest, lnext(entry))
    1435                 :            :                 {
    1436                 :          0 :                         ColumnDef  *restdef = lfirst(rest);
    1437                 :            : 
    1438         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (strcmp(coldef->colname, restdef->colname) == 0)
    1439         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 ereport(ERROR,
    1440                 :            :                                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_DUPLICATE_COLUMN),
    1441                 :            :                                                  errmsg("column \"%s\" specified more than once",
    1442                 :            :                                                                 coldef->colname)));
    1443                 :          0 :                 }
    1444                 :          0 :         }
    1445                 :            : 
    1446                 :            :         /*
    1447                 :            :          * Scan the parents left-to-right, and merge their attributes to form a
    1448                 :            :          * list of inherited attributes (inhSchema).  Also check to see if we need
    1449                 :            :          * to inherit an OID column.
    1450                 :            :          */
    1451                 :          0 :         child_attno = 0;
    1452         [ #  # ]:          0 :         foreach(entry, supers)
    1453                 :            :         {
    1454                 :          0 :                 RangeVar   *parent = (RangeVar *) lfirst(entry);
    1455                 :            :                 Relation        relation;
    1456                 :            :                 TupleDesc       tupleDesc;
    1457                 :            :                 TupleConstr *constr;
    1458                 :            :                 AttrNumber *newattno;
    1459                 :            :                 AttrNumber      parent_attno;
    1460                 :            : 
    1461                 :          0 :                 relation = heap_openrv(parent, AccessShareLock);
    1462                 :            : 
    1463         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (relation->rd_rel->relkind != RELKIND_RELATION)
    1464         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(ERROR,
    1465                 :            :                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_WRONG_OBJECT_TYPE),
    1466                 :            :                                          errmsg("inherited relation \"%s\" is not a table",
    1467                 :            :                                                         parent->relname)));
    1468                 :            :                 /* Permanent rels cannot inherit from temporary ones */
    1469 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (!istemp && isTempNamespace(RelationGetNamespace(relation)))
    1470         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(ERROR,
    1471                 :            :                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_WRONG_OBJECT_TYPE),
    1472                 :            :                                          errmsg("cannot inherit from temporary relation \"%s\"",
    1473                 :            :                                                         parent->relname)));
    1474                 :            : 
    1475                 :            :                 /* Reject if parent is CO for non-partitioned table */
    1476 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (RelationIsAoCols(relation) && !isPartitioned)
    1477         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(ERROR,
    1478                 :            :                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
    1479                 :            :                                          errmsg("cannot inherit relation \"%s\" as it is column oriented",
    1480                 :            :                                                         parent->relname)));
    1481                 :            :                 /*
    1482                 :            :                  * We should have an UNDER permission flag for this, but for now,
    1483                 :            :                  * demand that creator of a child table own the parent.
    1484                 :            :                  */
    1485         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (!pg_class_ownercheck(RelationGetRelid(relation), GetUserId()))
    1486                 :          0 :                         aclcheck_error(ACLCHECK_NOT_OWNER, ACL_KIND_CLASS,
    1487                 :          0 :                                                    RelationGetRelationName(relation));
    1488                 :            : 
    1489                 :            :                 /*
    1490                 :            :                  * Reject duplications in the list of parents.
    1491                 :            :                  */
    1492         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (list_member_oid(parentOids, RelationGetRelid(relation)))
    1493         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(ERROR,
    1494                 :            :                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_DUPLICATE_TABLE),
    1495                 :            :                          errmsg("relation \"%s\" would be inherited from more than once",
    1496                 :            :                                         parent->relname)));
    1497                 :            : 
    1498                 :          0 :                 parentOids = lappend_oid(parentOids, RelationGetRelid(relation));
    1499                 :            : 
    1500         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (relation->rd_rel->relhasoids)
    1501                 :          0 :                         parentsWithOids++;
    1502                 :            : 
    1503                 :          0 :                 tupleDesc = RelationGetDescr(relation);
    1504                 :          0 :                 constr = tupleDesc->constr;
    1505                 :            : 
    1506                 :            :                 /*
    1507                 :            :                  * newattno[] will contain the child-table attribute numbers for the
    1508                 :            :                  * attributes of this parent table.  (They are not the same for
    1509                 :            :                  * parents after the first one, nor if we have dropped columns.)
    1510                 :            :                  */
    1511                 :          0 :                 newattno = (AttrNumber *)
    1512                 :          0 :                         palloc0(tupleDesc->natts * sizeof(AttrNumber));
    1513                 :            : 
    1514         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 for (parent_attno = 1; parent_attno <= tupleDesc->natts;
    1515                 :          0 :                          parent_attno++)
    1516                 :            :                 {
    1517                 :          0 :                         Form_pg_attribute attribute = tupleDesc->attrs[parent_attno - 1];
    1518                 :          0 :                         char       *attributeName = NameStr(attribute->attname);
    1519                 :            :                         int                     exist_attno;
    1520                 :            :                         ColumnDef  *def;
    1521                 :            : 
    1522                 :            :                         /*
    1523                 :            :                          * Ignore dropped columns in the parent.
    1524                 :            :                          */
    1525         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (attribute->attisdropped)
    1526                 :          0 :                                 continue;               /* leave newattno entry as zero */
    1527                 :            : 
    1528                 :            :                         /*
    1529                 :            :                          * Does it conflict with some previously inherited column?
    1530                 :            :                          */
    1531                 :          0 :                         exist_attno = findAttrByName(attributeName, inhSchema);
    1532         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (exist_attno > 0)
    1533                 :            :                         {
    1534                 :            :                                 Oid                     defTypeId;
    1535                 :            :                                 int32           deftypmod;
    1536                 :            : 
    1537                 :            :                                 /*
    1538                 :            :                                  * Yes, try to merge the two column definitions. They must
    1539                 :            :                                  * have the same type and typmod.
    1540                 :            :                                  */
    1541         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 if (Gp_role == GP_ROLE_EXECUTE)
    1542                 :            :                                 {
    1543         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                         ereport(DEBUG1,
    1544                 :            :                                                 (errmsg("merging multiple inherited definitions of column \"%s\"",
    1545                 :            :                                                                 attributeName)));
    1546                 :          0 :                                 }
    1547                 :            :                                 else
    1548         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 ereport(NOTICE,
    1549                 :            :                                                 (errmsg("merging multiple inherited definitions of column \"%s\"",
    1550                 :            :                                                                 attributeName)));
    1551                 :          0 :                                 def = (ColumnDef *) list_nth(inhSchema, exist_attno - 1);
    1552                 :          0 :                                 defTypeId = typenameTypeId(NULL, def->typeName, &deftypmod);
    1553 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                                 if (defTypeId != attribute->atttypid ||
    1554                 :          0 :                                         deftypmod != attribute->atttypmod)
    1555         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                         ereport(ERROR,
    1556                 :            :                                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_DATATYPE_MISMATCH),
    1557                 :            :                                                 errmsg("inherited column \"%s\" has a type conflict",
    1558                 :            :                                                            attributeName),
    1559                 :            :                                                          errdetail("%s versus %s",
    1560                 :            :                                                                            TypeNameToString(def->typeName),
    1561                 :            :                                                                            format_type_be(attribute->atttypid))));
    1562                 :          0 :                                 def->inhcount++;
    1563                 :            :                                 /* Merge of NOT NULL constraints = OR 'em together */
    1564                 :          0 :                                 def->is_not_null |= attribute->attnotnull;
    1565                 :            :                                 /* Default and other constraints are handled below */
    1566                 :          0 :                                 newattno[parent_attno - 1] = exist_attno;
    1567                 :            : 
    1568                 :            :                                 /*
    1569                 :            :                                  * Update GpPolicy
    1570                 :            :                                  */
    1571         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 if (policy != NULL)
    1572                 :            :                                 {
    1573                 :          0 :                                         int attr_ofst = 0;
    1574                 :            : 
    1575 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                                         Assert(policy->nattrs >= 0 && "the number of distribution attributes is not negative");
                 [ #  # ]
    1576                 :            : 
    1577                 :            :                                         /* Iterate over all distribution attribute offsets */
    1578         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                         for (attr_ofst = 0; attr_ofst < policy->nattrs; attr_ofst++)
    1579                 :            :                                         {
    1580                 :            :                                                 /* Check if any distribution attribute has higher offset than the current */
    1581         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                                 if (policy->attrs[attr_ofst] > child_attno)
    1582                 :            :                                                 {
    1583 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                                                         Assert(policy->attrs[attr_ofst] > 0 && "index should not become negative");
                 [ #  # ]
    1584                 :          0 :                                                         policy->attrs[attr_ofst]--;
    1585                 :          0 :                                                 }
    1586                 :          0 :                                         }
    1587                 :          0 :                                 }
    1588                 :            : 
    1589                 :          0 :                         }
    1590                 :            :                         else
    1591                 :            :                         {
    1592                 :            :                                 /*
    1593                 :            :                                  * No, create a new inherited column
    1594                 :            :                                  */
    1595 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                                 def = makeNode(ColumnDef);
    1596                 :          0 :                                 def->colname = pstrdup(attributeName);
    1597                 :          0 :                                 def->typeName = makeTypeNameFromOid(attribute->atttypid,
    1598                 :          0 :                                                                                                         attribute->atttypmod);
    1599                 :          0 :                                 def->inhcount = 1;
    1600                 :          0 :                                 def->is_local = false;
    1601                 :          0 :                                 def->is_not_null = attribute->attnotnull;
    1602                 :          0 :                                 def->raw_default = NULL;
    1603                 :          0 :                                 def->cooked_default = NULL;
    1604                 :          0 :                                 def->constraints = NIL;
    1605                 :          0 :                                 inhSchema = lappend(inhSchema, def);
    1606                 :          0 :                                 newattno[parent_attno - 1] = ++child_attno;
    1607                 :            :                         }
    1608                 :            : 
    1609                 :            :                         /*
    1610                 :            :                          * Copy default if any
    1611                 :            :                          */
    1612         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (attribute->atthasdef)
    1613                 :            :                         {
    1614                 :          0 :                                 char       *this_default = NULL;
    1615                 :            :                                 AttrDefault *attrdef;
    1616                 :            :                                 int                     i;
    1617                 :            : 
    1618                 :            :                                 /* Find default in constraint structure */
    1619 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                                 Assert(constr != NULL);
    1620                 :          0 :                                 attrdef = constr->defval;
    1621         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 for (i = 0; i < constr->num_defval; i++)
    1622                 :            :                                 {
    1623         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                         if (attrdef[i].adnum == parent_attno)
    1624                 :            :                                         {
    1625                 :          0 :                                                 this_default = attrdef[i].adbin;
    1626                 :          0 :                                                 break;
    1627                 :            :                                         }
    1628                 :          0 :                                 }
    1629 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                                 Assert(this_default != NULL);
    1630                 :            : 
    1631                 :            :                                 /*
    1632                 :            :                                  * If default expr could contain any vars, we'd need to fix
    1633                 :            :                                  * 'em, but it can't; so default is ready to apply to child.
    1634                 :            :                                  *
    1635                 :            :                                  * If we already had a default from some prior parent, check
    1636                 :            :                                  * to see if they are the same.  If so, no problem; if not,
    1637                 :            :                                  * mark the column as having a bogus default. Below, we will

    1643                 :          0 :                                         def->cooked_default = pstrdup(this_default);
    1644         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 else if (strcmp(def->cooked_default, this_default) != 0)
    1645                 :            :                                 {

    1647                 :          0 :                                         have_bogus_defaults = true;
    1648                 :          0 :                                 }
    1649                 :          0 :                         }
    1650                 :          0 :                 }

    1659                 :            :                         int                     i;
    1660                 :            : 
    1661         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         for (i = 0; i < constr->num_check; i++)
    1662                 :            :                         {

    1669                 :            :                                                                                    1, 0,
    1670                 :          0 :                                                                                    newattno, tupleDesc->natts,
    1671                 :            :                                                                                    &found_whole_row);

    1680                 :            :                                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),

    1682                 :            :                                                          errdetail("Constraint \"%s\" contains a whole-row reference to table \"%s\".",

    1685                 :            : 
    1686                 :          0 :                                 cdef->contype = CONSTR_CHECK;
    1687                 :          0 :                                 cdef->name = pstrdup(check[i].ccname);
    1688                 :          0 :                                 cdef->raw_expr = NULL;
    1689                 :            : 
    1690                 :          0 :                                 cdef->cooked_expr = nodeToString(expr);
    1691                 :          0 :                                 constraints = lappend(constraints, cdef);
    1692                 :          0 :                         }
    1693                 :          0 :                 }
    1694                 :            : 
    1695                 :          0 :                 pfree(newattno);

    1697                 :            :                 /*
    1698                 :            :                  * Close the parent rel, but keep our AccessShareLock on it until xact
    1699                 :            :                  * commit.      That will prevent someone else from deleting or ALTERing
    1700                 :            :                  * the parent before the child is committed.
    1701                 :            :                  */
    1702                 :          0 :                 heap_close(relation, NoLock);
    1703                 :          0 :         }
    1704                 :            : 
    1705                 :            :         /*
    1706                 :            :          * If we had no inherited attributes, the result schema is just the
    1707                 :            :          * explicitly declared columns.  Otherwise, we need to merge the declared
    1708                 :            :          * columns into the inherited schema list.
    1709                 :            :          */
    1710         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (inhSchema != NIL)
    1711                 :            :         {
    1712         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 foreach(entry, schema)
    1713                 :            :                 {
    1714                 :          0 :                         ColumnDef  *newdef = lfirst(entry);
    1715                 :          0 :                         char       *attributeName = newdef->colname;
    1716                 :            :                         int                     exist_attno;
    1717                 :            : 
    1718                 :            :                         /*
    1719                 :            :                          * Does it conflict with some previously inherited column?
    1720                 :            :                          */
    1721                 :          0 :                         exist_attno = findAttrByName(attributeName, inhSchema);
    1722         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (exist_attno > 0)
    1723                 :            :                         {
    1724                 :            :                                 ColumnDef  *def;
    1725                 :            :                                 Oid                     defTypeId,
    1726                 :            :                                                         newTypeId;
    1727                 :            :                                 int32           deftypmod,
    1728                 :            :                                                         newtypmod;
    1729                 :            : 
    1730                 :            :                                 /*
    1731                 :            :                                  * Yes, try to merge the two column definitions. They must
    1732                 :            :                                  * have the same type and typmod.
    1733                 :            :                                  */
    1734         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 ereport((Gp_role == GP_ROLE_EXECUTE) ? DEBUG1 : NOTICE,
    1735                 :            :                                    (errmsg("merging column \"%s\" with inherited definition",
    1736                 :            :                                                    attributeName)));
    1737                 :          0 :                                 def = (ColumnDef *) list_nth(inhSchema, exist_attno - 1);
    1738                 :          0 :                                 defTypeId = typenameTypeId(NULL, def->typeName, &deftypmod);
    1739                 :          0 :                                 newTypeId = typenameTypeId(NULL, newdef->typeName, &newtypmod);
    1740 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                                 if (defTypeId != newTypeId || deftypmod != newtypmod)
    1741         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                         ereport(ERROR,
    1742                 :            :                                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_DATATYPE_MISMATCH),
    1743                 :            :                                                          errmsg("column \"%s\" has a type conflict",
    1744                 :            :                                                                         attributeName),
    1745                 :            :                                                          errdetail("%s versus %s",
    1746                 :            :                                                                            TypeNameToString(def->typeName),
    1747                 :            :                                                                            TypeNameToString(newdef->typeName))));
    1748                 :            :                                 /* Mark the column as locally defined */
    1749                 :          0 :                                 def->is_local = true;
    1750                 :            :                                 /* Merge of NOT NULL constraints = OR 'em together */
    1751                 :          0 :                                 def->is_not_null |= newdef->is_not_null;
    1752                 :            :                                 /* If new def has a default, override previous default */
    1753         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 if (newdef->raw_default != NULL)
    1754                 :            :                                 {
    1755                 :          0 :                                         def->raw_default = newdef->raw_default;
    1756                 :          0 :                                         def->cooked_default = newdef->cooked_default;
    1757                 :          0 :                                 }
    1758                 :          0 :                         }
    1759                 :            :                         else
    1760                 :            :                         {
    1761                 :            :                                 /*
    1762                 :            :                                  * No, attach new column to result schema
    1763                 :            :                                  */

    1765                 :            :                         }
    1766                 :          0 :                 }
    1767                 :            : 
    1768                 :          0 :                 schema = inhSchema;
    1769                 :            : 
    1770                 :            :                 /*
    1771                 :            :                  * Check that we haven't exceeded the legal # of columns after merging
    1772                 :            :                  * in inherited columns.
    1773                 :            :                  */
