   15420                 :            : /*
   15421                 :            :  * Execute ALTER TABLE SET SCHEMA
   15422                 :            :  *
   15423                 :            :  * Note: caller must have checked ownership of the relation already
   15424                 :            :  */
   15425                 :            : void
   15426                 :            : AlterTableNamespace(RangeVar *relation, const char *newschema)
   15427                 :            : {
   15428                 :            :         Relation        rel;
   15429                 :            :         Oid                     relid;
   15430                 :            :         Oid                     oldNspOid;
   15431                 :            :         Oid                     nspOid;
   15432                 :            :         ObjectAddresses *objsMoved;
   15433                 :            : 
   15434                 :          0 :         rel = relation_openrv(relation, AccessExclusiveLock);
   15435                 :            : 
   15436                 :          0 :         relid = RelationGetRelid(rel);
   15437                 :          0 :         oldNspOid = RelationGetNamespace(rel);
   15438                 :            : 
   15439                 :            :         /* Can we change the schema of this tuple? */
   15440   [ #  #  #  #  :          0 :         switch (rel->rd_rel->relkind)
          #  #  #  #  #  
                      # ]
   15441                 :            :         {
   15442                 :            :                 case RELKIND_RELATION:
   15443                 :            :                 case RELKIND_VIEW:
   15444                 :            :                         /* ok to change schema */
   15445                 :          0 :                         break;
   15446                 :            :                 case RELKIND_SEQUENCE:
   15447                 :            :                         {
   15448                 :            :                                 /* if it's an owned sequence, disallow moving it by itself */
   15449                 :            :                                 Oid                     tableId;
   15450                 :            :                                 int32           colId;
   15451                 :            : 
   15452         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                 if (sequenceIsOwned(relid, &tableId, &colId))
   15453         [ #  # ]:          0 :                                         ereport(ERROR,
   15454                 :            :                                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
   15455                 :            :                                                          errmsg("cannot move an owned sequence into another schema"),
   15456                 :            :                                           errdetail("Sequence \"%s\" is linked to table \"%s\".",
   15457                 :            :                                                                 RelationGetRelationName(rel),
   15458                 :            :                                                                 get_rel_name(tableId))));
   15459                 :            :                         }
   15460                 :          0 :                         break;
   15461                 :            :                 case RELKIND_COMPOSITE_TYPE:
   15462         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(ERROR,
   15463                 :            :                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_WRONG_OBJECT_TYPE),
   15464                 :            :                                          errmsg("\"%s\" is a composite type",
   15465                 :            :                                                         RelationGetRelationName(rel)),
   15466                 :            :                                          errhint("Use ALTER TYPE instead.")));
   15467                 :          0 :                         break;
   15468                 :            :                 case RELKIND_INDEX:
   15469                 :            :                 case RELKIND_TOASTVALUE:
   15470                 :            :                 case RELKIND_AOSEGMENTS:
   15471                 :            :                 case RELKIND_AOBLOCKDIR:
   15472                 :            :                 case RELKIND_AOVISIMAP:
   15473                 :            :                         /* FALL THRU */
   15474                 :            :                 default:
   15475         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(ERROR,
   15476                 :            :                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_WRONG_OBJECT_TYPE),
   15477                 :            :                                          errmsg("\"%s\" is not a table, view, or sequence",
   15478                 :            :                                                         RelationGetRelationName(rel))));
   15479                 :          0 :         }
   15480                 :            : 
   15481                 :            :         /* get schema OID and check its permissions */
   15482                 :          0 :         nspOid = LookupCreationNamespace(newschema);
   15483                 :            : 
   15484                 :            :         /* common checks on switching namespaces */
   15485                 :          0 :         CheckSetNamespace(oldNspOid, nspOid, RelationRelationId, relid);
   15486                 :            : 
   15487                 :            :         /* OK, modify the pg_class row and pg_depend entry */
   15488                 :          0 :         objsMoved = new_object_addresses();
   15489                 :          0 :         AlterTableNamespaceInternal(rel, oldNspOid, nspOid, objsMoved);
   15490                 :          0 :         free_object_addresses(objsMoved);
   15491                 :            : 
   15492                 :            :         /* MPP-7825, MPP-6929, MPP-7600: metadata tracking */
   15493         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if ((Gp_role == GP_ROLE_DISPATCH)
   15494         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 && MetaTrackValidKindNsp(rel->rd_rel))
   15495                 :          0 :                 MetaTrackUpdObject(RelationRelationId,
   15496                 :          0 :                                                    RelationGetRelid(rel),
   15497                 :          0 :                                                    GetUserId(),
   15498                 :            :                                                    "ALTER", "SET SCHEMA"
   15499                 :            :                                 );
   15500                 :            : 
   15501                 :            :         /* close rel, but keep lock until commit */
   15502                 :          0 :         relation_close(rel, NoLock);
   15503                 :          0 : }
   15504                 :            : 
   15505                 :            : /*
   15506                 :            :  * The guts of relocating a table to another namespace: besides moving
   15507                 :            :  * the table itself, its dependent objects are relocated to the new schema.
   15508                 :            :  */
   15509                 :            : void
   15510                 :            : AlterTableNamespaceInternal(Relation rel, Oid oldNspOid, Oid nspOid,
   15511                 :            :                                                         ObjectAddresses *objsMoved)
   15512                 :            : {
   15513                 :            :         Relation        classRel;
   15514                 :            : 
   15515 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         Assert(objsMoved != NULL);
   15516                 :            : 
   15517                 :            :         /* OK, modify the pg_class row and pg_depend entry */
   15518                 :          0 :         classRel = heap_open(RelationRelationId, RowExclusiveLock);
   15519                 :            : 
   15520                 :          0 :         AlterRelationNamespaceInternal(classRel, RelationGetRelid(rel), oldNspOid,
   15521                 :          0 :                                                                    nspOid, true, objsMoved);
   15522                 :            : 
   15523                 :            :         /* Fix the table's row type too */
   15524                 :          0 :         AlterTypeNamespaceInternal(rel->rd_rel->reltype,
   15525                 :          0 :                                                            nspOid, false, false, objsMoved);
   15526                 :            : 
   15527                 :            :         /* Fix other dependent stuff */
   15528         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (rel->rd_rel->relkind == RELKIND_RELATION)
   15529                 :            :         {
   15530                 :          0 :                 AlterIndexNamespaces(classRel, rel, oldNspOid, nspOid, objsMoved);
   15531                 :          0 :                 AlterSeqNamespaces(classRel, rel, oldNspOid, nspOid,
   15532                 :          0 :                                                    objsMoved, AccessExclusiveLock);
   15533                 :          0 :                 AlterConstraintNamespaces(RelationGetRelid(rel), oldNspOid, nspOid,
   15534                 :          0 :                                                                   false, objsMoved);
   15535                 :          0 :         }
   15536                 :            : 
   15537                 :          0 :         heap_close(classRel, RowExclusiveLock);
   15538                 :          0 : }
   15539                 :            : 
   15540                 :            : /*
   15541                 :            :  * The guts of relocating a relation to another namespace: fix the pg_class
   15542                 :            :  * entry, and the pg_depend entry if any.  Caller must already have
   15543                 :            :  * opened and write-locked pg_class.
   15544                 :            :  */
   15545                 :            : void
   15546                 :            : AlterRelationNamespaceInternal(Relation classRel, Oid relOid,
   15547                 :            :                                                            Oid oldNspOid, Oid newNspOid,
   15548                 :            :                                                            bool hasDependEntry, ObjectAddresses *objsMoved)
   15549                 :            : {
   15550                 :            :         HeapTuple       classTup;
   15551                 :            :         Form_pg_class classForm;
   15552                 :            :         ObjectAddress   thisobj;
   15553                 :            : 
   15554                 :          0 :         classTup = SearchSysCacheCopy1(RELOID, ObjectIdGetDatum(relOid));
   15555         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (!HeapTupleIsValid(classTup))
   15556                 :          0 :                 elog(ERROR, "cache lookup failed for relation %u", relOid);
   15557                 :          0 :         classForm = (Form_pg_class) GETSTRUCT(classTup);
   15558                 :            : 
   15559 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         Assert(classForm->relnamespace == oldNspOid);
   15560                 :            : 
   15561                 :          0 :         thisobj.classId = RelationRelationId;
   15562                 :          0 :         thisobj.objectId = relOid;
   15563                 :          0 :         thisobj.objectSubId = 0;
   15564                 :            : 
   15565                 :            :         /*
   15566                 :            :          * Do nothing when there's nothing to do.
   15567                 :            :          */
   15568         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (!object_address_present(&thisobj, objsMoved))
   15569                 :            :         {
   15570                 :            :                 /* check for duplicate name (more friendly than unique-index failure) */
   15571 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (get_relname_relid(NameStr(classForm->relname),
                 [ #  # ]
   15572                 :          0 :                                                           newNspOid) != InvalidOid)
   15573         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         ereport(ERROR,
   15574                 :            :                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_DUPLICATE_TABLE),
   15575                 :            :                                          errmsg("relation \"%s\" already exists in schema \"%s\"",
   15576                 :            :                                                         NameStr(classForm->relname),
   15577                 :            :                                                         get_namespace_name(newNspOid))));
   15578                 :            : 
   15579                 :            :                 /* classTup is a copy, so OK to scribble on */
   15580                 :          0 :                 classForm->relnamespace = newNspOid;
   15581                 :            : 
   15582                 :          0 :                 simple_heap_update(classRel, &classTup->t_self, classTup);
   15583                 :          0 :                 CatalogUpdateIndexes(classRel, classTup);
   15584                 :            : 
   15585                 :            :                 /* Update dependency on schema if caller said so */
   15586 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (hasDependEntry &&
   15587                 :          0 :                         changeDependencyFor(RelationRelationId, relOid,
   15588                 :          0 :                                                                 NamespaceRelationId, oldNspOid, newNspOid) != 1)
   15589                 :          0 :                         elog(ERROR, "failed to change schema dependency for relation \"%s\"",
   15590                 :            :                                  NameStr(classForm->relname));
   15591                 :            : 
   15592                 :          0 :                 add_exact_object_address(&thisobj, objsMoved);
   15593                 :          0 :         }
   15594                 :            : 
   15595                 :          0 :         heap_freetuple(classTup);
   15596                 :          0 : }
   15597                 :            : 
   15598                 :            : /*
   15599                 :            :  * Move all indexes for the specified relation to another namespace.
   15600                 :            :  *
   15601                 :            :  * Note: we assume adequate permission checking was done by the caller,
   15602                 :            :  * and that the caller has a suitable lock on the owning relation.
   15603                 :            :  */
   15604                 :            : static void
   15605                 :            : AlterIndexNamespaces(Relation classRel, Relation rel,
   15606                 :            :                                          Oid oldNspOid, Oid newNspOid, ObjectAddresses *objsMoved)
   15607                 :            : {
   15608                 :            :         List       *indexList;
   15609                 :            :         ListCell   *l;
   15610                 :            : 
   15611                 :          0 :         indexList = RelationGetIndexList(rel);
   15612                 :            : 
   15613         [ #  # ]:          0 :         foreach(l, indexList)
   15614                 :            :         {
   15615                 :          0 :                 Oid                     indexOid = lfirst_oid(l);
   15616                 :            :                 ObjectAddress thisobj;
   15617                 :            : 
   15618                 :          0 :                 thisobj.classId = RelationRelationId;
   15619                 :          0 :                 thisobj.objectId = indexOid;
   15620                 :          0 :                 thisobj.objectSubId = 0;
   15621                 :            : 
   15622                 :            :                 /*
   15623                 :            :                  * Note: currently, the index will not have its own dependency on the
   15624                 :            :                  * namespace, so we don't need to do changeDependencyFor(). There's no
   15625                 :            :                  * rowtype in pg_type, either.
   15626                 :            :                  *
   15627                 :            :                  * XXX this objsMoved test may be pointless -- surely we have a single
   15628                 :            :                  * dependency link from a relation to each index?
   15629                 :            :                  */
   15630         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (!object_address_present(&thisobj, objsMoved))
   15631                 :            :                 {
   15632                 :          0 :                         AlterRelationNamespaceInternal(classRel, indexOid,
   15633                 :          0 :                                                                                    oldNspOid, newNspOid,
   15634                 :          0 :                                                                                    false, objsMoved);
   15635                 :          0 :                         add_exact_object_address(&thisobj, objsMoved);
   15636                 :          0 :                 }
   15637                 :          0 :         }
   15638                 :            : 
   15639                 :          0 :         list_free(indexList);
   15640                 :          0 : }
   15641                 :            : 
   15642                 :            : /*
   15643                 :            :  * Move all SERIAL-column sequences of the specified relation to another
   15644                 :            :  * namespace.
   15645                 :            :  *
   15646                 :            :  * Note: we assume adequate permission checking was done by the caller,
   15647                 :            :  * and that the caller has a suitable lock on the owning relation.
   15648                 :            :  */
   15649                 :            : static void
   15650                 :            : AlterSeqNamespaces(Relation classRel, Relation rel,
   15651                 :            :                                    Oid oldNspOid, Oid newNspOid, ObjectAddresses *objsMoved,
   15652                 :            :                                    LOCKMODE lockmode)
   15653                 :            : {
   15654                 :            :         Relation        depRel;
   15655                 :            :         SysScanDesc scan;
   15656                 :            :         ScanKeyData key[2];
   15657                 :            :         HeapTuple       tup;
   15658                 :            : 
   15659                 :            :         /*
   15660                 :            :          * SERIAL sequences are those having an auto dependency on one of the
   15661                 :            :          * table's columns (we don't care *which* column, exactly).
   15662                 :            :          */
   15663                 :          0 :         depRel = heap_open(DependRelationId, AccessShareLock);
   15664                 :            : 
   15665                 :          0 :         ScanKeyInit(&key[0],
   15666                 :            :                                 Anum_pg_depend_refclassid,
   15667                 :            :                                 BTEqualStrategyNumber, F_OIDEQ,
   15668                 :          0 :                                 ObjectIdGetDatum(RelationRelationId));
   15669                 :          0 :         ScanKeyInit(&key[1],
   15670                 :            :                                 Anum_pg_depend_refobjid,
   15671                 :            :                                 BTEqualStrategyNumber, F_OIDEQ,
   15672                 :          0 :                                 ObjectIdGetDatum(RelationGetRelid(rel)));
   15673                 :            :         /* we leave refobjsubid unspecified */
   15674                 :            : 
   15675                 :          0 :         scan = systable_beginscan(depRel, DependReferenceIndexId, true,
   15676                 :          0 :                                                           SnapshotNow, 2, key);
   15677                 :            : 
   15678         [ #  # ]:          0 :         while (HeapTupleIsValid(tup = systable_getnext(scan)))
   15679                 :            :         {
   15680                 :          0 :                 Form_pg_depend depForm = (Form_pg_depend) GETSTRUCT(tup);
   15681                 :            :                 Relation        seqRel;
   15682                 :            : 
   15683                 :            :                 /* skip dependencies other than auto dependencies on columns */
   15684 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (depForm->refobjsubid == 0 ||
   15685         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         depForm->classid != RelationRelationId ||
   15686         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         depForm->objsubid != 0 ||
   15687                 :          0 :                         depForm->deptype != DEPENDENCY_AUTO)
   15688                 :          0 :                         continue;
   15689                 :            : 
   15690                 :            :                 /* Use relation_open just in case it's an index */
   15691                 :          0 :                 seqRel = relation_open(depForm->objid, lockmode);
   15692                 :            : 
   15693                 :            :                 /* skip non-sequence relations */
   15694         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (RelationGetForm(seqRel)->relkind != RELKIND_SEQUENCE)
   15695                 :            :                 {
   15696                 :            :                         /* No need to keep the lock */
   15697                 :          0 :                         relation_close(seqRel, lockmode);
   15698                 :          0 :                         continue;
   15699                 :            :                 }
   15700                 :            : 
   15701                 :            :                 /* Fix the pg_class and pg_depend entries */
   15702                 :          0 :                 AlterRelationNamespaceInternal(classRel, depForm->objid,
   15703                 :          0 :                                                                            oldNspOid, newNspOid,
   15704                 :          0 :                                                                            true, objsMoved);
   15705                 :            : 
   15706                 :            :                 /*
   15707                 :            :                  * Sequences have entries in pg_type. We need to be careful to move
   15708                 :            :                  * them to the new namespace, too.
   15709                 :            :                  */
   15710                 :          0 :                 AlterTypeNamespaceInternal(RelationGetForm(seqRel)->reltype,
   15711                 :          0 :                                                                    newNspOid, false, false, objsMoved);
   15712                 :            : 
   15713                 :            :                 /* Now we can close it.  Keep the lock till end of transaction. */
   15714                 :          0 :                 relation_close(seqRel, NoLock);
   15715                 :            :         }
   15716                 :            : 
   15717                 :          0 :         systable_endscan(scan);
   15718                 :            : 
   15719                 :          0 :         relation_close(depRel, AccessShareLock);
   15720                 :          0 : }
   15721                 :            : 
   15722                 :            : 
   15723                 :            : /*
   15724                 :            :  * This code supports
   15725                 :            :  *      CREATE TEMP TABLE ... ON COMMIT { DROP | PRESERVE ROWS | DELETE ROWS }
   15726                 :            :  *
   15727                 :            :  * Because we only support this for TEMP tables, it's sufficient to remember
   15728                 :            :  * the state in a backend-local data structure.
   15729                 :            :  */
   15730                 :            : 
   15731                 :            : /*
   15732                 :            :  * Register a newly-created relation's ON COMMIT action.
   15733                 :            :  */
   15734                 :            : void
   15735                 :            : register_on_commit_action(Oid relid, OnCommitAction action)
   15736                 :            : {
   15737                 :            :         OnCommitItem *oc;
   15738                 :            :         MemoryContext oldcxt;
   15739                 :            : 
   15740                 :            :         /*
   15741                 :            :          * We needn't bother registering the relation unless there is an ON COMMIT
   15742                 :            :          * action we need to take.
   15743                 :            :          */
   15744 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :         if (action == ONCOMMIT_NOOP || action == ONCOMMIT_PRESERVE_ROWS)
   15745                 :          0 :                 return;
   15746                 :            : 
   15747                 :          0 :         oldcxt = MemoryContextSwitchTo(CacheMemoryContext);
   15748                 :            : 
   15749                 :          0 :         oc = (OnCommitItem *) palloc(sizeof(OnCommitItem));

   15760                 :            : /*
   15761                 :            :  * Unregister any ON COMMIT action when a relation is deleted.
   15762                 :            :  *
   15763                 :            :  * Actually, we only mark the OnCommitItem entry as to be deleted after commit.

   15773                 :            : 
   15774         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (oc->relid == relid)
   15775                 :            :                 {
   15776                 :          0 :                         oc->deleting_subid = GetCurrentSubTransactionId();
   15777                 :          0 :                         break;
   15778                 :            :                 }
   15779                 :          0 :         }
   15780                 :          0 : }
   15781                 :            : 
   15782                 :            : /*
   15783                 :            :  * Perform ON COMMIT actions.
   15784                 :            :  *
   15785                 :            :  * This is invoked just before actually committing, since it's possible
   15786                 :            :  * to encounter errors.
   15787                 :            :  */
   15788                 :            : void
   15789                 :            : PreCommit_on_commit_actions(void)
   15790                 :            : {
   15791                 :            :         ListCell   *l;
   15792                 :          0 :         List       *oids_to_truncate = NIL;
   15793                 :            : 
   15794                 :            :         /*
   15795                 :            :          * We skip this operation in the catchup handler, especially
   15796                 :            :          * between prepare and commit state, as we may not see the heap
   15797                 :            :          * that has just been created in the prepared transaction that
   15798                 :            :          * is not visible yet.  Skipping this under the catchup handler
   15799                 :            :          * should be ok in known cases.
   15800                 :            :          */
   15801         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (in_process_catchup_event)
   15802                 :          0 :                 return;
   15803                 :            : 
   15804         [ #  # ]:          0 :         foreach(l, on_commits)
   15805                 :            :         {
   15806                 :          0 :                 OnCommitItem *oc = (OnCommitItem *) lfirst(l);
   15807                 :            : 
   15808                 :            :                 /* Ignore entry if already dropped in this xact */
   15809         [ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (oc->deleting_subid != InvalidSubTransactionId)
   15810                 :          0 :                         continue;
   15811                 :            : 
   15812   [ #  #  #  #  :          0 :                 switch (oc->oncommit)
                      # ]
   15813                 :            :                 {
   15814                 :            :                         case ONCOMMIT_NOOP:
   15815                 :            :                         case ONCOMMIT_PRESERVE_ROWS:
   15816                 :            :                                 /* Do nothing (there shouldn't be such entries, actually) */
   15817                 :          0 :                                 break;
   15818                 :            :                         case ONCOMMIT_DELETE_ROWS:
   15819                 :          0 :                                 oids_to_truncate = lappend_oid(oids_to_truncate, oc->relid);
   15820                 :          0 :                                 break;
   15821                 :            :                         case ONCOMMIT_DROP:
   15822                 :            :                                 {
   15823                 :            :                                         ObjectAddress object;
   15824                 :            : 
   15825                 :          0 :                                         object.classId = RelationRelationId;
   15826                 :          0 :                                         object.objectId = oc->relid;
   15827                 :          0 :                                         object.objectSubId = 0;
   15828                 :          0 :                                         performDeletion(&object, DROP_CASCADE);
   15829                 :            : 
   15830                 :            :                                         /*
   15831                 :            :                                          * Note that table deletion will call
   15832                 :            :                                          * remove_on_commit_action, so the entry should get marked
   15833                 :            :                                          * as deleted.
   15834                 :            :                                          */
   15835 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                                         Assert(oc->deleting_subid != InvalidSubTransactionId);
   15836                 :          0 :                                         break;
   15837                 :            :                                 }
   15838                 :            :                 }
   15839                 :          0 :         }
   15840         [ #  # ]:          0 :         if (oids_to_truncate != NIL)
   15841                 :            :         {
   15842                 :          0 :                 heap_truncate(oids_to_truncate);
   15843                 :          0 :                 CommandCounterIncrement();              /* XXX needed? */
   15844                 :          0 :         }
   15845                 :          0 : }

   15847                 :            : /*
   15848                 :            :  * Post-commit or post-abort cleanup for ON COMMIT management.
   15849                 :            :  *
   15850                 :            :  * All we do here is remove no-longer-needed OnCommitItem entries.
   15851                 :            :  *
   15852                 :            :  * During commit, remove entries that were deleted during this transaction;
   15853                 :            :  * during abort, remove those created during this transaction.
   15854                 :            :  */
   15855                 :            : void
   15856                 :            : AtEOXact_on_commit_actions(bool isCommit)
   15857                 :            : {
   15858                 :            :         ListCell   *cur_item;
   15859                 :            :         ListCell   *prev_item;
   15860                 :            : 
   15861                 :          0 :         prev_item = NULL;
   15862                 :          0 :         cur_item = list_head(on_commits);
   15863                 :            : 
   15864         [ #  # ]:          0 :         while (cur_item != NULL)
   15865                 :            :         {
   15866                 :          0 :                 OnCommitItem *oc = (OnCommitItem *) lfirst(cur_item);
   15867                 :            : 
   15868 [ #  # ][ #  # ]:          0 :                 if (isCommit ? oc->deleting_subid != InvalidSubTransactionId :
                 [ #  # ]
   15869                 :          0 :                         oc->creating_subid != InvalidSubTransactionId)
   15870                 :            :                 {
   15871                 :            :                         /* cur_item must be removed */
   15872                 :          0 :                         on_commits = list_delete_cell(on_commits, cur_item, prev_item);
   15873                 :          0 :                         pfree(oc);
   15874         [ #  # ]:          0 :                         if (prev_item)
   15875                 :          0 :                                 cur_item = lnext(prev_item);
   15876                 :            :                         else
   15877                 :          0 :                                 cur_item = list_head(on_commits);
   15878                 :          0 :                 }
   15879                 :            :                 else
   15880                 :            :                 {
   15881                 :            :                         /* cur_item must be preserved */
   15882                 :          0 :                         oc->creating_subid = InvalidSubTransactionId;
   15883                 :          0 :                         oc->deleting_subid = InvalidSubTransactionId;
   15884                 :          0 :                         prev_item = cur_item;
   15885                 :          0 :                         cur_item = lnext(prev_item);
   15886                 :            :                 }
   15887                 :            :         }
   15888                 :          0 : }
   15889                 :            : 
   15890                 :            : /*
   15891                 :            :  * Post-subcommit or post-subabort cleanup for ON COMMIT management.
   15892                 :            :  *
   15893                 :            :  * During subabort, we can immediately remove entries created during this
   15894                 :            :  * subtransaction.      During subcommit, just relabel entries marked during
   15895                 :            :  * this subtransaction as being the parent's responsibility.
